description: A tenant reports a leaky faucet in their bathroom. The property manager must log the issue and dispatch a plumber.

nodes.task_description: Identify the tenant and their property address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the tenant account and associated property.

nodes.task_description: Create a new maintenance work order in the property management system.

expected_outcome.value: A work order is created with the issue 'Leaky Faucet' and a 'High' priority.

nodes.task_description: Assign the work order to the approved plumbing vendor and notify the tenant.

expected_outcome.value: The work order is dispatched to 'Pro Plumbers' and an automated notification is sent to the tenant.
